apiCapBoundary: Reported identified totals come from each API. Only the first 100 metadata records per protocol/API were downloaded; dedupe and screening counts therefore apply only to downloaded metadata.

apiExecutions.query: ((ion channel*[Title/Abstract] OR synaptic plasticity[Title/Abstract] OR glia*[Title/Abstract] OR neuromodulator*[Title/Abstract]) AND (human*[Title/Abstract] OR Humans[Mesh])) AND (review[Publication Type] OR systematic review[Title/Abstract] OR consensus[Title/Abstract])
ion channels synaptic plasticity glia neuromodulators human neurophysiology review
ion channels synaptic plasticity glia neuromodulators human neurophysiology review

((brainstem[Title/Abstract] OR thalamus[Title/Abstract] OR basal ganglia[Title/Abstract] OR cerebellum[Title/Abstract]) AND (network*[Title/Abstract] OR regulation[Title/Abstract])) AND (human*[Title/Abstract] OR Humans[Mesh])
brainstem thalamus basal ganglia cerebellum regulation network human review
brainstem thalamus basal ganglia cerebellum regulation network human
((central autonomic network[Title/Abstract] OR baroreflex[Title/Abstract]) AND (respiration[Title/Abstract] OR posture[Title/Abstract] OR heart rate variability[Title/Abstract])) AND Humans[Mesh]
central autonomic network baroreflex respiration posture heart rate variability human
central autonomic network baroreflex respiration posture HRV human

((HPA axis[Title/Abstract] OR hypothalamic pituitary adrenal[Title/Abstract] OR sympathoadrenal[Title/Abstract] OR SAM system[Title/Abstract]) AND (child*[Title/Abstract] OR adolescen*[Title/Abstract]) AND (development*[Title/Abstract] OR reactivity[Title/Abstract] OR recovery[Title/Abstract]))
HPA SAM child adolescent development stress reactivity recovery systematic review
HPA SAM child adolescent stress development reactivity recovery

((vestibular[Title/Abstract] OR propriocept*[Title/Abstract] OR tactile[Title/Abstract] OR auditory[Title/Abstract]) AND (sensory modulation[Title/Abstract] OR sensory processing[Title/Abstract])) AND (human*[Title/Abstract] OR Humans[Mesh])
vestibular proprioceptive tactile auditory sensory modulation human development measurement
vestibular proprioceptive tactile auditory sensory modulation human development
((co-regulation[Title/Abstract] OR coregulation[Title/Abstract] OR dyadic regulation[Title/Abstract]) AND (development*[Title/Abstract] OR culture[Title/Abstract] OR cross-cultural[Title/Abstract]))
co-regulation dyadic regulation development cultural cross-cultural review
co-regulation dyadic regulation development cultural cross-cultural review

((executive function[Title/Abstract] OR cognitive control[Title/Abstract]) AND (task impurity[Title/Abstract] OR reliability[Title/Abstract] OR construct validity[Title/Abstract] OR test-retest[Title/Abstract]))
executive function task impurity reliability construct validity test retest
executive function task impurity reliability construct validity test retest

((sleep[Title/Abstract] OR circadian[Title/Abstract]) AND (child*[Title/Abstract] OR adolescen*[Title/Abstract] OR pediatric[Title/Abstract]) AND (development*[Title/Abstract] OR maturation[Title/Abstract] OR duration[Title/Abstract]))
pediatric sleep circadian development maturation child adolescent systematic review
pediatric sleep circadian development child adolescent systematic review

((ADHD[Title/Abstract] OR developmental coordination disorder[Title/Abstract] OR dyslexia[Title/Abstract] OR developmental language disorder[Title/Abstract] OR Tourette[Title/Abstract] OR neurodiversity[Title/Abstract]) AND (adult*[Title/Abstract] OR developmental[Title/Abstract] OR lifespan[Title/Abstract]))
ADHD DCD dyslexia language disorder Tourette adult neurodiversity lifespan review
ADHD DCD dyslexia language disorder Tourette adult neurodiversity lifespan review

((DNA assessment[Title/Abstract] OR DNA profile[Title/Abstract]) AND (psychometric*[Title/Abstract] OR reliability[Title/Abstract] OR validity[Title/Abstract] OR measurement invariance[Title/Abstract] OR measurement error[Title/Abstract]))
DNA assessment psychometric reliability validity measurement invariance measurement error
DNA assessment psychometric reliability validity measurement invariance measurement error
